task_graph: {"nodes": [{"id": "Node1", "description": "Open the article in the WeChat app"}, {"id": "Node2", "description": "Tap the three-dot menu to find sharing options"}, {"id": "Node3", "description": "Copy the article's URL from the sharing options"}, {"id": "Node4", "description": "Paste the copied URL into a browser to test accessibility"}, {"id": "Node5", "description": "Determine if the article is behind a login wall based on browser response"}, {"id": "Node6", "description": "Use the WeChat in-app browser if the article requires login"}, {"id": "Node7", "description": "Save the article via WeChat’s Favorites feature if no public link exists"}, {"id": "Node8", "description": "Take screenshots as a backup for private articles"}], "links": [{"source": "Node1", "target": "Node2", "type": "navigateMenu"}, {"source": "Node2", "target": "Node3", "type": "copyLink"}, {"source": "Node3", "target": "Node4", "type": "testAccessibility"}, {"source": "Node4", "target": "Node5", "type": "checkLoginWall"}, {"source": "Node5", "target": "Node6", "type": "useInAppBrowser"}, {"source": "Node5", "target": "Node7", "type": "saveToFavorites"}, {"source": "Node7", "target": "Node8", "type": "backupWithScreenshots"}]}
